RLE Technologies is a trusted provider of environmental monitoring solutions with over 40 years of industry experience. Their systems are known for stability, longevity, and seamless integration, with deployments still running strong more than a decade after installation.

## Core Offerings

- **Wireless Monitoring**: Battery-powered sensors with up to 12 years battery life and 600 ft range
- **Wi-Fi Solutions**: Leverage existing infrastructure for sensor connectivity
- **Wired Systems**: Secure, closed-loop monitoring for high-security applications
- **Controller Options**: From compact F200 units to full-scale FMS systems

## Key Technologies

- Fast system response rates (up to 10-second intervals)
- Native BACnet/IP, MS/TP, Modbus TCP/RTU, and SNMP integration
- No recurring subscription fees
- On-premises operation with local data logging
- Plug-and-play sensor deployment

RLE Technologies serves leading hyperscalers, global AI infrastructure providers, cloud platform partners, and federal emergency networks worldwide.
